title: Complexity Tier — Manifest Fragment Schema (v1)
description: Validates the manifest fields written by factory_complexity.py after requirements-analyst completes. Used by factory_validate.py when manifest.complexity_tier is present.

skip_stages.description: Stage IDs that must be skipped for this tier. Critical stages (workspace-scout, requirements-analyst, workflow-planner, code-generator, build-test-agent) are never in this list.

merge_codegen_gate.description: When true, code-generator skips its inner plan approval and outputs sub_stage=generated directly.

reviewer_pool.description: Subset of reviewers to spawn in /factory-review. reviewer-code is always included.

then.description: LARGE tier must have no skipped stages.
